name: Orgemon
description: A Digimon whose form resembles that of the Oni from Eastern legends. The attacks it performs using its absurdly developed muscles exhibit tremendous destructive power. Although it has high intelligence, it has a violent temperament, and there is no limit to the destruction that it brings about with 'anger' acting as its driving force. Due to its intense love for battle, it will boldly challenge even opponents that greatly surpass it in combat ability, earning it the name " Digimon Hunter ". The Hone Konbou it wields in its right arm was earned from defeating Skull Greymon in battle. Its Special Move is Haouken , fired off from its two gigantic arms.
